infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 07 - 09 June 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 15:45, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team Document 22 Date 05 June 2026 Time 14:39 No / Driver

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 15:45, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team
Document 22
Date 05 June 2026
Time 14:39
No / Driver 41 - Arvid Lindblad
Reason Alleged breach of Article B4.1.1 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Car 41 allegedly
impeding Car 81 in turn 12 at 14:23.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes
